summary: Iteration 158 — Public Share Links, Referral Tracking, EngOps Notifications/Stratus/Dismissal Audit testing complete. Backend: 29/29 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All routes verified (/pastry/look/{token}, /pastry/admin with referrals panel, /pastry/gallery with share panel, /eng-ops/notifications, /eng-ops/dismissal-audit, /eng-ops/stratus).
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/pastry/look/{share_token} returns public-safe payload WITHOUT prompt field ✓
GET /api/pastry/referrals/leaderboard returns sorted list by referral_count ✓
POST /api/eng-ops/stratus/plans with priority=critical → sla_hours=2, escalation_level=0, assignee_role=owner ✓
POST /api/eng-ops/stratus/plans/run-escalation scans and escalates overdue plans ✓
POST /api/eng-ops/stratus/plans/{id}/resolve → status=resolved, events[] gains resolved event ✓
Email service gracefully queues when RESEND_API_KEY missing (queued_no_provider) ✓
/pastry/look/{share_token} renders pastry-look-page with title, image, approve CTA ✓
/pastry/gallery modal has share panel with client-name input, publish-share button, share-url + copy-share ✓
/pastry/admin shows PastryReferrals panel with leaderboard table ✓
/eng-ops/notifications renders with assignee filter, unread toggle, mark-read + dismiss buttons ✓
/eng-ops/stratus renders with create-btn, run-escalation button, result panel ✓
CakeFlowers.tsx has guards to prevent stray flower state arc (lines 294-308) ✓
test_credentials: STRIPE_API_KEY=sk_test_emergent, FAL_KEY set in backend/.env, RESEND_API_KEY NOT set (email queues gracefully)
seed_data_creation: Test notifications, plans, and dismissals created with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter158 delivered: (1) Public share links at /pastry/look/{share_token} with client-approval CTAs - publish via POST /api/pastry/look/{render_id}/publish, unpublish via POST /api/pastry/look/{render_id}/unpublish, view via GET /api/pastry/look/{share_token}. (2) Referral tracking with unique codes (REF-*), leaderboard, ping endpoint for landing page tracking, paid conversion credits referrer +30d. (3) Email service with Resend fallback - queues to email_outbox when RESEND_API_KEY missing. (4) APScheduler cron jobs for daily billing sweep (14:00 UTC) + 15-min SLA escalation. (5) Stratus SLA plans with owner→duty_manager→GM escalation chain. (6) Assigned-notifications panel at /eng-ops/notifications with filters. (7) Dismissal audit log at /eng-ops/dismissal-audit with KPI tiles. (8) CakeFlowers guards prevent stray flower state arc. All endpoints tested and working. Seeded data: rnd-demo-01 share published with token 65617132d8, sub-001 has referral code REF-SUB-00-*.
